mapper.sql: id, name, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_news_category WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM edu_news_category WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_news_category (name, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_news_category SET name = #{name}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_news_category SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
